questionHtml: The distance to Gacrux can be determined using stellar parallax. Outline why this method is not suitable for all stars.
markschemeHtml:
if the star is too far then the parallax angle is too small to be measured

OR

stellar parallax is limited to closer stars

 

OWTTE

[1 mark]
